templates.title: GENERATING
templates.whenToUse: A cinematic showreel where the work was AI-generated: scroll-snap full-screen beats, each showing the prompt then the result denoising in.
templates.signature: Each image resolves from noise with a lime render scan-line; prompt as architectural-scale type; query-reticle cursor.

templates.title: ORBIT (v3)
templates.whenToUse: A landing where a hero 3D object (your real .glb) floats in a particle-lit WebGL space, then scrolls into a gallery below.
templates.signature: Three.js textured model + spectrum particle field + bloom + mouse-parallax, gated to the hero for performance.

templates.title: BENTO (v2)
templates.whenToUse: A scannable multi-asset gallery with varied tile sizes, the developing-frame reveal, and a standby rail.
templates.signature: Broken-grid bento with per-modality accent hues and a developing-photo reveal on scroll.

templates.title: PLAYHEAD
templates.whenToUse: A sequenced set of full-bleed media (year-in-review, generation timeline, portfolio progression) you scrub left-to-right like a video playhead.
templates.signature: A fixed gold scrubber turns vertical wheel into eased horizontal travel; the visitor IS the playhead, with a NN/NN HUD and stroked chapter indices.

templates.title: QUERY
templates.palette: two-color near-black + electric cyan; media supplies color
templates.whenToUse: A reel/portfolio that reads like prompting a model: a minimal monochrome typographic index you query with the cursor (rows reveal their asset on hover, click to lock).
templates.signature: Cursor-driven floating reveal that lags with velocity tilt and a trailing cyan shadow; non-queried rows dim.

templates.title: THE VERMILLION PRESS
templates.whenToUse: An editorial/art-journal landing with giant variable serif sharing the canvas with one big asset per spread; a light-mode contrast to dark templates.
templates.signature: Oversized Fraunces variable type whose weight deforms to scroll rhythm; type overlaps media via exclusion blend.

templates.title: PROVENANCE
templates.whenToUse: Present finished AI media to a client as a reverent old-master museum exhibition, giving each output art-historical weight.
templates.signature: Each work in a gilt frame with a spotlight pool and aged varnish; an engraved museum placard reveals on a slow intersection.

templates.title: SPACE (Mood Wall)
templates.whenToUse: An immersive showreel where you fly the camera through floating framed works in 3D Z-space, advancing on scroll.
templates.signature: Framed media planes in depth with reflective floor; scroll advances the fly-through; clean 2D fallback on mobile.

templates.title: STDOUT
templates.whenToUse: A developer/CLI-native audience: frame the work as a beautiful control-room where each render prints to stdout beneath the exact command that produced it.
templates.signature: $ commands with real flags + a live stats strip; the output prints below the command. Monospace throughout.

templates.title: MORPH
templates.palette: two-color near-black + one accent; media inside the type
templates.whenToUse: A type-as-interface studio hero where giant words morph and react, with the media revealed inside/behind the letterforms.
templates.signature: Huge variable letters react to scroll and cursor; media shows through the type. (Best seen live; kinetic.)

templates.title: ARC
templates.palette: one bold accent + chromatic arc cold->warm->hot
templates.whenToUse: Tell a progression story (raw to refined, draft to final) where the page color temperature heats up cold to warm to hot as you scroll.
templates.signature: Full-bleed beats whose palette shifts cold-warm-hot as a felt narrative ladder; headline-scale type.

templates.title: SPOTLIGHT NOIR
templates.whenToUse: A gallery felt as discovery: work hidden in a black stage, revealed only where the viewer's cursor light falls; click to lock and bloom.
templates.signature: A warm tungsten spotlight (GPU-composited shade) follows the cursor; only the lit work reads; the locked piece blooms to full clarity.

templates.title: FILM STRIP
templates.whenToUse: A cinematic reel where each asset is a frame on a literal 35mm strip you scrub left-to-right like a cutting-room timeline.
templates.signature: Sprocket-holed celluloid strip with Kodak edge codes + 24fps timecode HUD; the centered frame enlarges and plays.

templates.title: LIQUID
templates.whenToUse: A studio/agency hero where 3-6 full-bleed works ARE the navigation and the liquid morph between them is the brand identity.
templates.signature: A WebGL displacement shader ripples the work toward the pointer and morph-dissolves between pieces; clean CSS crossfade on mobile.

templates.title: RASTER WERK
templates.whenToUse: A disciplined print-grade poster series or asset index on a hard 12-col grid with oversized numerals and one accent color.
templates.signature: Difference-blend stamped index numerals anchoring flat primary-color plates on a strict modular grid with registration marks.

templates.title: DEPTH
templates.whenToUse: A reel where each piece sits in real dimensional layers - the room moves with scroll and pointer for a floating, diorama feel.
templates.signature: Foreground, midground, work, and background move at different rates so works float in dimensional space; pure CSS transforms.

templates.title: CUT & PASTE
templates.whenToUse: Present AI works as a raw hand-pasted photocopied zine (torn paper, tape, halftone, marker) instead of clean editorial gloss; scrolling flips the issue.
templates.signature: Washi-tape scroll-progress strip; torn-paper, tape-pinned cut-outs paste down on scroll with a folio page counter.

templates.title: CHROME COVER FLOW
templates.whenToUse: Show a curated reel one cinematic hero at a time with 3D depth; drag, scroll, or arrows flip through angled cards with a reflection.
templates.signature: Pure-CSS preserve-3d cover flow: flat-forward centered card with a reflection, side cards fanned on the Y-axis with depth-of-field blur.

templates.title: ISSUE
templates.whenToUse: A work archive where every piece deserves its own newsstand cover - masthead, cover lines, barcode, full-bleed hero; snap-scroll flips the issue.
templates.signature: Oversized Fraunces masthead bled across the top + floating cover-line kickers + a per-issue accent + a seeded SVG barcode.

templates.title: DRAFTING TABLE
templates.whenToUse: A precise technical portfolio or index where each piece is framed and dimensioned like an engineering drawing, hairlines drawing on scroll.
templates.signature: Hairline SVG draws itself (stroke-dashoffset) framing and dimensioning each work like a part on a blueprint, with spec callouts.

templates.title: SIGNAL DECAY
templates.whenToUse: An edgy digital-decay reel where works arrive and depart via datamosh: RGB split, scanline tear, block displacement, I-frame smear.
templates.signature: RGB channel split + scanline + block displacement + I-frame smear on each transition with a persistent VHS shimmer; reduced-motion = clean cuts.

templates.title: DIPTYCH
templates.whenToUse: Show a clear quality jump between two versions of the same subject (local vs hosted, draft vs final); the side-by-side comparison carries the narrative.
templates.signature: A sticky RAW/REFINED split where the glowing accent seam auto-sweeps on scroll and is pointer-draggable for hand comparison; oversized labels.

templates.title: ATELIER CANVAS
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work as an explorable spatial workspace (mood board) you pan and zoom, rather than a scrolling page.
templates.signature: A transform-layer pan/zoom board with works pinned spatially, curved connector wires, sticky notes, a live minimap, and cluster-zoom pills.

templates.title: RING CAROUSEL
templates.whenToUse: Orbit a small set of works around a rotating CSS-3D cylinder spun by drag, scroll, or keys, where only the front panel plays.
templates.signature: A slowly rotating CSS-3D cylinder: the front panel sharp + amber-lit + the only one decoding/playing, neighbors curving away in perspective.

templates.title: ONE KEY (Manifesto)
templates.whenToUse: A reading-first manifesto/long-read where each work is an inline captioned figure that masks in as you reach it; the opposite of a flashy reel.
templates.signature: A centered Newsreader reading column with a vermilion drop-cap, margin footnotes, oversized pull-quotes, and a folio that renames per movement.

templates.title: BOOT
templates.whenToUse: An animated boot sequence where a BIOS-style screen loads each asset, then the work fills the screen with a CRT power-on flash.
templates.signature: BIOS init lines + a progress bar load each asset, then a CRT power-on flash; scanlines + screen-curvature vignette; rhythmic module-by-module.

templates.title: GOLDEN HOUR
templates.palette: five real-clock bands: pre-dawn indigo, sunrise amber, midday bone, golden-hour vermilion, night navy
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio whose ambient mood should track the visitor's real local time of day while the works themselves stay constant.
templates.signature: A fixed living sky (gradient + sun + stars + horizon) and every card's cast-shadow angle driven by the visitor's real clock, with a draggable corner clock-face that scrubs any hour; pure CSS variables, no WebGL.

templates.title: THE PROVENANCE FILES
templates.archetype: FOIA redacted dossier, hover to declassify
templates.palette: manila #d8cdb4 over near-black, stamp red #a01b14 / blue #1f3a63, declassified green #2f8f3e
templates.whenToUse: A showcase that frames each work as a classified exhibit you declassify, doubling as a clean provenance-transparency story.
templates.signature: Hover, click or tap a black redaction bar to wipe it away with a clip-path dissolve and flash a green DECLASSIFIED stamp, tracked by a live redactions-remaining counter and a DECLASSIFY ENTIRE FILE button.

templates.title: CONSTELLATION
templates.archetype: works as nodes in a navigable star-map
templates.ref: Fauna Robotics spatial UI, node-graph star maps
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work as an explorable star-field where each work is a glowing node and constellation lines group themes.
templates.signature: Pan and zoom a dark star-field of glowing work-nodes joined by constellation lines; hover a node for its prompt + thumbnail, click to lock and dim the rest; Canvas 2D, touch pan/pinch on mobile.

templates.title: FOLDWORK
templates.whenToUse: A case-study reel where each work creases and folds away like paper to reveal the next; tactile editorial papercraft, no WebGL.
templates.signature: Scroll-driven pure-CSS 3D diagonal fold: the upper triangle of each sheet rotates back around a corner hinge, a crease shadow tracing the fold and a cobalt paper underside revealing the next work.

templates.title: HALFTONE
templates.ref: Niccolo Fanton dithering shader (Codrops 2025), Game-Boy / e-ink
templates.palette: paper #e8e4d8 + ink #1a1a1a (the dither is the color system)
templates.whenToUse: An anti-AI-polish reel where every image and video is rendered live as a 1-bit ordered-dither grid; hover and click reveal the source.
templates.signature: A live WebGL Bayer-dither shader renders all media as a dense 1-bit pixel grid that brightens on cursor proximity and dissolves to full color on click; a Bayer-LUT texture keeps it GPU-robust.
